prompt: Describe a thunderstorm. No sentence may contain more than 5 words. Keep every sentence to 5 words or fewer.
response:
Dark clouds gather above us.

The sky turns gray.

Wind begins to howl.

Trees sway back and forth.

Lightning cracks the sky open.

Thunder shakes the ground.

Rain pours down hard.

Puddles form on streets.

Flashes illuminate the darkness.

The air smells electric.

Hail pelts the rooftops.

Windows rattle and shake.

Children hide under blankets.

Dogs whimper in corners.

The storm rages on.

Then silence slowly returns.

Clouds begin to part.

Sunlight peeks through again.

Everything drips and glistens.

The world feels renewed.
